transitions.name: physics_join_from_left_high
transitions.description: Materialize high effective severity from the left code.

transitions.name: physics_join_from_right_high
transitions.description: Materialize high effective severity from the right code.

transitions.name: physics_join_from_left_mid
transitions.description: Materialize mid effective severity from the left code.

transitions.name: physics_join_from_right_mid
transitions.description: Materialize mid effective severity from the right code.

transitions.name: physics_contract_high
transitions.description: Interior contraction lowers high severity to mid.

transitions.name: physics_contract_mid
transitions.description: Interior contraction lowers mid severity to zero and reaches boundary.

transitions.name: physics_boundary_reset
transitions.description: Boundary reset re-arms the local interior for another relaxation pass.
